name: tool_group_scene_multi_device_scene
description: Create or update a multi-device scene membership in one step by providing a controller/scene and a list of member devices with controller/responder roles.

group_address.description: Optional. Scene/group address to receive all listed members. If omitted, a new scene/group will be created. If provided and already a scene/group, the listed members will be added to it with the provided roles. If provided and not already a scene/group, an error will be returned.

group_name.description: Optional. Name for the new group/scene if group_address is not provided, nucore will provide its own

devices.description: Mandatory list of device role definitions for this scene/group.

name.description: Optional member label when adding to the scene.
